overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest path during golden hour. The character moves steadily through a pine forest with warm sunset lighting casting long shadows across the dirt trail, transitioning from an open meadow area to a denser woodland with distant mountain views.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords on his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees forming the left boundary of the forest
tall evergreen pine trees forming the right boundary of the forest
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass and vegetation
grassy meadow area with wildflowers alongside the path
small water puddle reflecting the golden light on the left side of path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a sunlit forest meadow path during golden hour. Tall pine trees line both sides of the dirt trail while grass and small puddles flank the walkway, bathed in warm orange light.

events.description: path enters deeper shade as the tree canopy becomes denser overhead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking steadily through the narrowing forest corridor

segments.scene_description: The forest becomes denser as the path continues, with trees closing in from both sides. The lighting shifts to a more diffused shade as the canopy thickens, and the water puddle disappears from view behind the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with distant peaks

events.description: snow-capped mountains become visible through the trees in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt follows the curving path to the left while maintaining steady walking pace

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peak visible through the forest canopy in the distance

segments.scene_description: The trail curves left through denser forest, revealing distant snow-capped mountains through the trees ahead. The path becomes more enclosed by vegetation while maintaining the warm golden hour lighting from the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest path that transitions from an open, sunlit meadow into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees and small puddles, all bathed in the warm orange glow of golden hour. As the character progresses, the forest becomes denser and the canopy thickens, causing the lighting to shift into a more diffused shade as the open meadow recedes. The scene then curves left through the tightening vegetation, where the trees begin to frame a distant view of snow-capped mountains. Finally, the path becomes fully enclosed by the woodland while maintaining the lingering warmth of the setting sun.
